purpose: Present one customer-facing record per canonical MMG asset ID and issue secure short-lived read or download access only after server-side ownership and delivery revalidation.

identity_contract.ownership_authority: active non-revoked mmg_ownership_grants record keyed by customer_id and asset_id
identity_contract.duplicate_grant_behavior: Aggregate active grant sources and dates into one customer-facing item.

delivery_contract.primary_file_rule: At most one active primary file per asset and access kind.
delivery_contract.subscription_access_gate: Subscription-delivered assets remain preparing until the linked entitlement window is delivered.

secure_access_contract.replayed_request_behavior: Reject with a customer-safe retryable response.
revalidation_sequence: Revalidate active ownership for the customer and asset.
Revalidate subscription delivery completion when subscription_delivery is the only ownership source.
Resolve the active primary delivery file.
Issue a short-lived HTTPS signed URL.
Record the access result without storing the signed URL.

customer_experience.empty_state: Direct the customer to subscription selection and the public Knowledge Library.
customer_experience.preparing_state: Show the asset in My Library while keeping read and download controls unavailable until delivery completes.

privacy_contract: Do not expose delivery-grant IDs or entitlement-window IDs.
Do not expose storage providers or object keys.
Do not expose permanent file URLs.
Do not expose internal delivery-package references.
Use customer-safe error codes and messages.
release_gates: Apply all entitlement, delivery-window, thank-you handoff, and My Library migrations.
Configure the authenticated Customer Portal GET endpoint.
Configure same-origin and CSRF validation for the access endpoint.
Populate verified active primary delivery files for every deliverable asset.
Verify subscription delivery windows reach delivered before file access is enabled.
Inject a session-bound CSRF token into the Customer Portal integration.
Capture the complete current Customer Portal source before insertion.
Insert My Library without replacing existing dashboard, project, upload, support, or navigation modules.
Test purchased, subscription-delivered, bonus, administrative, preparing, revoked, missing-file, replay, expired-link, and signer-failure cases.
Complete authentication, authorization, privacy, accessibility, mobile, storage, and download QA.

subsequent_components: Live Shopify provisioning and end-to-end deployment
